PromFileSdConfigAppender 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 PromFileSdConfigAppender

  add        Add a target and job to the configuration file.

  remove     Remove a target or job from the configuration file. Specifying a
             job without specifiying a target will remove all associated targets
             with it.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

commands.payload:
PromFileSdConfigAppender 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 PromFileSdConfigAppender

  add        Add a target and job to the configuration file.

  remove     Remove a target or job from the configuration file. Specifying a
             job without specifiying a target will remove all associated targets
             with it.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
PromFileSdConfigAppender 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 PromFileSdConfigAppender

  -j, --job            Required. Unique name of the job to which the target
                       belongs.

  -t, --target         Required. Target to be added.

  -c, --config-path    (Default: targets.json) Path to the configuration file
                       for Prometheus File SD.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

result.stderr:
PromFileSdConfigAppender 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 PromFileSdConfigAppender

  -j, --job            Required. Removes the given job and all its associated
                       targets if a target isn't specified.

  -t, --target         Target to be removed. Its job name must be specified.

  -c, --config-path    (Default: targets.json) Path to the configuration file
                       for Prometheus File SD.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Add a target and job to the configuration file.

options.description: Unique name of the job to which the target belongs.
Path to the configuration file for Prometheus File SD.

staticCommands.name: remove
staticCommands.description: Remove a target or job from the configuration file. Specifying a job without specifiying a target will remove all associated targets with it.

options.description: Removes the given job and all its associated targets if a target isn't specified.
